data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design follows Fitts's Law by ensuring clickable elements are easy to access.
data.technical_spec: Consistent spacing and size for interactive elements.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes choice overload by categorizing and ordering information effectively.
data.technical_spec: Use of dropdown menus and tabbed navigation.

data.title: Golden Ratio
data.description: Utilizes the Golden Ratio in layout design to create pleasing aesthetics.
data.technical_spec: Proportional layouts maintaining an 1.618:1 aspect ratio.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Design prompts users to complete tasks, using the principle that incomplete tasks are remembered better.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information to be processed to around 7 items at once.
